reference_description: Harry Kane prepares to take a penalty kick for England against Croatia in the FIFA World Cup 2026. The clip shows Kane in close-up composing himself, then standing over the ball on the penalty spot with the Croatian goalkeeper on the goal line. The clip ends before the kick is taken — this is the moment of anticipation before the penalty.

England (in white) delivers a corner kick into Croatia's penalty area during the 8th minute of this FIFA World Cup 2026 Group L match, with the score level at 0-0. The ball is played into a crowded box where multiple England attackers challenge Croatian defenders in blue, resulting in a scramble near the six-yard box. The sequence ends with the referee stopping play inside the penalty area, likely for a foul, as Croatia's goalkeeper in pink positions himself on his line and England players appeal for a decision.
